name: Red Sparrow Summoner
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>朱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>す</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card you control is destroyed by battle with an opponent's attacking monster and sent to your Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 Warrior-Type monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.
